license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7r2hm8e
title: Protocol for Dephosphorylation of 5′ ends of DNA using Quick CIP (NEB #M0525)
author: New England   Biolabs

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare a 20 µL reaction as follows: %s %s DNA1 pmol of DNA ends*CutSmart® Buffer (10X)2 μlQuick CIP1 μlH2O, purifiedto 20 μl** * Note: 1 pmol of DNA ends is about 1 μg of a 3 kb plasmid. ** Scale larger reaction volumes proportionally.
Stop reaction by heat-inactivation at 80 °C for 00:02:00 .
